sessions.intent: Fix all 7 OBP violations across signing/crypto/identity/provider modules

before.assumptions: All 7 violations identified in prior analysis are real and fixable without breaking existing tests. The interfaces may need new methods.
before.risk: Interface changes cascade to all implementations. Only DefaultIdentityProvider exists.

sessions.plan: Fix 7 OBP violations: (1) IdentityData hardcodes DefaultIdentityProvider - add GetOrCreateDefaultAsync to IIdentityProvider, (2) SignedData decomposes IdentityVariable - Sign takes identity object, (3) Duplicated key-gen in DefaultIdentityProvider - extract GenerateIdentity, (4) Manual Deserialize mapper - use JSON round-trip, (5) Static helpers on Hash action - move to HashedData, (6) Reflection in load.cs - add non-generic Register, (7) Inline contract matching - extract ContractsMatch method.

actions.context: Fix 6: Added non-generic Register(Type, IProvider) to EngineProviders, removed reflection from load.cs
Fixes 1+3: Added GetOrCreateDefaultAsync to interface, IdentityData uses interface, extracted GenerateIdentity method
Fixes 2+7: Sign takes IdentityVariable not decomposed strings, extracted ContractsMatch method
Fix 5: Moved SerializeData/FormatHash from Hash action to HashedData (owner)
Updated test reference from Hash.FormatHash to HashedData.FormatHash

after.notes: 10 files changed. All fixes follow OBP patterns: behavior on owner, navigate not decompose, interface not concrete type.
